home.title: Emoji, after fixed lists.
home.lead: Paoji is an open emoji object protocol that lets anyone create, share, resolve, render, and gracefully degrade new expressions.
home.sub: It uses YS Token as the shareable entry, PJD for expression documents, PJP for official and user component packs, and Registry for naming, versions, trust, and fallback.
protocol.title: The token is an entry, the expression is an object.
protocol.token: Used for sharing, detection, and validation. It is not the full creation file; it is an entry that a resolver can expand.
protocol.document: The readable expression document, including nodes, component references, semantics, requirements, and fallback rules.
protocol.pack: A resource pack for components, materials, motion, character templates, and fallback. Official and user components share the same format.
components.title: Official components will grow, users will be chaotic, so everything starts as packages.
designer.title: Design components, not dead images.
wiki.title: A shared language for designers and developers.
